calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-12-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:25am
Judge Pro Tem Donald Drummond, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. No appearance by the respondent, Gary King. ROA shows that Gary King's notice of appeal was returned. Appellant, Richard Manfredonia, is present. Also present as witnesses are Steve Nemec, Ms. Majac and Mr. Hill. Party and witnesses, previously sworn, testify briefly in the narrative. The Court determines that the Respondent was not properly served.
9:35am
The matter is submitted. Judge Drummond states he will research the matter, but Appellant is advised to file a proof of service before the matter can be heard. No evidence is marked or retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-09-2009 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-27-2008 Continued To Dec-19-08 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-06-2008 Continued To Oct-27-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
